title: acrophorus parvulus
intro: Acrophorus parvulus is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is commonly known as the dwarf acrophorus or small acrophorus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. Acrophorus parvulus is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by drying the leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions for various health benefits.
